prompt: Tap hj as the position anchor before acting.
why_v1: Position anchors keep action order clear before a track-specific action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The hijack is the right seat anchor, so the cue read stays tied to the earlier late-position range that starts the pressure.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The hijack is the right position anchor because the full strategic read depends on knowing which range owns the informational edge.
